tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons)
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario to eliminate backend dependency and ensure deterministic download behaviour.

tests.journey: A user selects a role, uploads a source file without any add-ons, submits the analysis, and verifies that the downloaded Markdown file is named using the role shortcode and source filename stem.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, Product Owner role, no add-ons, auth.feature uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, QA Manager role, no add-ons, auth.feature uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, Product Owner role, no add-ons, checkout_flow.feature uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, Product Owner role, no add-ons, login.spec.ts uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked

rows.add_ons: Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment
Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations

tests.journey: A user selects a role, chooses one or more add-ons, uploads a source file, submits the analysis, and verifies that the downloaded filename encodes each selected add-on as an ordered short code suffix.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, Product Owner role, Technical Review add-on, auth.feature uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, QA Manager role, Technical Review + Gap Analysis + Risk Assessment add-ons, auth.feature uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, QA Manager role, all five add-ons selected, auth.feature uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

tests.test_name: Pasted text with no filename falls back to date-time
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario to eliminate backend dependency and ensure deterministic download behaviour.

tests.journey: A user pastes BDD content directly (no file upload), submits the analysis, and verifies the downloaded Markdown filename falls back to a date-time stamp pattern since no source filename is available.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasted text with no filename falls back to date-time
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, Product Owner role, no file uploaded — content pasted instead
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown

tests.test_name: Pasted text with add-ons falls back to date-time with add-on suffix
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked
test_hooks.explanation: Stubs the analysis API before each scenario to eliminate backend dependency and ensure deterministic download behaviour.

tests.journey: A user pastes BDD content with add-ons selected, submits the analysis, and verifies the downloaded Markdown filename combines the date-time fallback with the encoded add-on short codes.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Pasted text with add-ons falls back to date-time with add-on suffix
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page with mocked API, Product Owner role, Technical Review and Gap Analysis add-ons selected, content pasted with no file upload
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits analysis and clicks Download Markdown
